title: Mniodes pickeringii

It belongs to the genus Mniodes, which is closely related to other genera such as Chryselium and Leptorhynchos. The exact classification of Mniodes pickeringii can be found in various taxonomic resources, including the Integrated Taxonomic Information System (ITIS) and The Plant List. This plant is native to the Americas and can be found growing in various habitats, including rocky outcrops and scrublands. Further information on its classification may be found in scientific literature and databases.
